assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority leaves severity unchanged and emits no prefix when enrichment is empty
assertionResults.title: leaves severity unchanged and emits no prefix when enrichment is empty

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority KEV-listed bumps any starting severity straight to critical
assertionResults.title: KEV-listed bumps any starting severity straight to critical

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority KEV-listed without due date or ransomware emits a clean prefix
assertionResults.title: KEV-listed without due date or ransomware emits a clean prefix

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS ≥ 0.9 (no KEV) bumps severity exactly one tier
assertionResults.title: EPSS ≥ 0.9 (no KEV) bumps severity exactly one tier

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS ≥ 0.9 caps at critical (already-critical stays critical)
assertionResults.title: EPSS ≥ 0.9 caps at critical (already-critical stays critical)

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS bump emits an EPSS-evidence prefix line with score and percentile
assertionResults.title: EPSS bump emits an EPSS-evidence prefix line with score and percentile

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS < 0.01 + CVSS < 4.0 (no KEV) caps severity at low and emits a deprioritise prefix
assertionResults.title: EPSS < 0.01 + CVSS < 4.0 (no KEV) caps severity at low and emits a deprioritise prefix

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS < 0.01 but CVSS ≥ 4.0 leaves severity unchanged (deprioritise gate is conjunctive)
assertionResults.title: EPSS < 0.01 but CVSS ≥ 4.0 leaves severity unchanged (deprioritise gate is conjunctive)

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority KEV beats deprioritise: low EPSS does not undo a KEV bump
assertionResults.title: KEV beats deprioritise: low EPSS does not undo a KEV bump

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority EPSS just below the bump threshold (0.89) does not bump
assertionResults.title: EPSS just below the bump threshold (0.89) does not bump

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority respects a custom policy override
assertionResults.title: respects a custom policy override

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority default policy thresholds match the documented values (0.9 / 0.01)
assertionResults.title: default policy thresholds match the documented values (0.9 / 0.01)

assertionResults.fullName: applyThreatIntelPriority treats unknown / blank starting severity as medium for ranking purposes
assertionResults.title: treats unknown / blank starting severity as medium for ranking purposes
